actions.label: Stop Golem Provider
cmd: pkill -f ya-provider; pkill -f yagna; echo 'Golem stopped.'

actions.label: System Resource Status
cmd: echo '=== CPU/RAM ===' && top -bn1 | head -5 && echo '=== GPU ===' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,memory.used,memory.total,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader && echo '=== Disk ===' && df -h /home/andrew

actions.label: Echo Memory Stats
cmd: cd ~/Echo && python3 -c "from echo_memory_sqlite import get_memory; m=get_memory(); print(f'Semantic memories: {m.count()}'); last=m.get_last_session_summary(); print(f'Last session: {last[\"created_at\"][:10] if last else None}')"

actions.label: Read a file from Echo's directory
actions.note: Set ECHO_FILE env var to relative path

actions.label: Run a Python file in Echo directory (safe, read-only intent)
actions.note: Set ECHO_SCRIPT env var to script name

actions.label: Write a Python file inside Echo directory (self-coding)
actions.note: Set ECHO_FILE (relative path) and ECHO_CODE (python code)

actions.label: Check Golem task queue
cmd: ya-provider task list 2>/dev/null || golemsp status 2>/dev/null | head -20

actions.label: Check Golem earnings and payment status
cmd: yagna payment status 2>/dev/null && yagna payment accounts 2>/dev/null

actions.label: Full Echo services and timers status
cmd: systemctl --user list-units --state=active | grep echo && systemctl --user list-timers --no-pager | grep echo

actions.label: Fix/patch a Python file using self_coder
cmd: cd ~/Echo && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/home/andrew/Echo'); from core.self_coder import fix_file; fix_file('$ECHO_FILE', '$ECHO_FIX')"
actions.note: Set ECHO_FILE (relative path) and ECHO_FIX (description of what to fix)

actions.label: Query Echo event ledger (recent events across all sources)
cmd: python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect('/home/andrew/Echo/memory/echo_events.db'); rows = conn.execute('SELECT ts, event_type, source, summary, outcome_score FROM events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20').fetchall(); [print(f\"{r[0][:16]} [{r[1]}] {r[2]}: {r[3][:80]} score={r[4]}\") for r in rows]; conn.close()"

actions.label: Send a notification to Andrew's phone via ntfy
cmd: cd ~/Echo && python3 -c "from core.notifier import notify; notify('$ECHO_TITLE', '$ECHO_MSG')"
actions.note: Set ECHO_TITLE and ECHO_MSG env vars

actions.label: Run Golem task matcher diagnostic
actions.note: Checks why Golem has 0 tasks and logs recommendations

actions.label: Publish a markdown file to dev.to
actions.note: Set ECHO_FILE to path relative to ~/Echo. Publishes live — use carefully.

actions.label: Show current Golem pricing on all presets
actions.note: Read-only — shows current cpu/duration prices in GLM

actions.label: Update Golem pricing (cpu and duration per second in GLM)
actions.note: Set GOLEM_CPU and GOLEM_DUR env vars. Safe bounds enforced: 0.00001-0.001

actions.label: Write and queue a dev.to article draft
actions.note: Set ECHO_TITLE and ECHO_OUTLINE. Writes markdown to content/, queues in draft_queue.json
